ticket.title: Remote rigs SSH-RPC v2: extract yah-rpc + yah-rpc-ssh transport
yah-rpc-ssh: run daemon on remote host, pipe JSON-RPC over SSH stdio
next_steps: Use openssh-rs or shell out to ssh; framing is line-delimited JSON-RPC
Health/keepalive: re-establish on connection drop with exponential backoff

ticket.title: Frontend env adapter SSH backend: third backend alongside tauri/browser
next_steps: When a remote rig is selected, route rpc calls over a Tauri command that fronts yah-rpc-ssh
Connection state surfaces in the existing ConnectionStrip (R015)

ticket.title: Extract yah-rpc: transport-agnostic crate from existing serde shapes
next_steps: Trivially derivable from yah-kg/src/rpc.rs — split request/response types into yah-rpc
yah-kg-daemon and the Tauri command layer both consume it
